job_description: We are looking for a Data Analyst to join our analytics team. You will work closely with product and engineering to define metrics, build dashboards, and deliver insights. Requirements: 3+ years experience with SQL, Python (pandas, numpy), Tableau or Power BI, and experience with dbt for data transformation. Familiarity with Snowflake or BigQuery is required. You will own the reporting layer and work with stakeholders to identify business opportunities from data. Experience with A/B testing and statistical analysis is a strong plus.
title: Data Analyst
company_description: TechCorp is a leading SaaS company.

job_description: Senior Data Analyst position at a fast-growing fintech. You will build and maintain our data warehouse on BigQuery, create self-serve dashboards in Looker, and perform advanced statistical analysis to drive product decisions. Must have strong SQL skills, proficiency in Python for data manipulation, experience with Looker or similar BI tools, and hands-on dbt experience. Knowledge of Airflow for pipeline orchestration is a plus. You will partner with data engineers to ensure data quality and with product managers to define KPIs.
title: Senior Data Analyst
company_description: FinanceFlow is a next-generation fintech platform.

job_description: Business Intelligence Analyst needed to support our growing analytics practice. Day-to-day: writing complex SQL queries, building Tableau dashboards, maintaining dbt models, and presenting findings to executive leadership. Requirements: SQL (advanced), Tableau (certified preferred), Python scripting, experience with Snowflake or Redshift, dbt Core or dbt Cloud, and strong business acumen. Experience with Google Analytics or Mixpanel is a plus. You will work in an agile environment with two-week sprint cycles.
title: Business Intelligence Analyst
company_description: RetailGiant is a Fortune 500 retail company.

job_description: Analytics Engineer role blending data engineering and analytics. You will own our dbt project end-to-end, build dimensional models, create Looker Explores, and write Python-based data tests. Required: strong SQL, dbt (intermediate+), Python, BigQuery or Snowflake, version control (Git), and experience with data modeling best practices. Looker LookML experience is required. Experience with Airflow or Prefect for orchestration is a strong plus. You will collaborate with data scientists on feature engineering for ML pipelines.
title: Analytics Engineer
company_description: DataDriven is an early-stage Series B analytics company.

job_description: Insights Analyst position on the growth team. You will design and analyse A/B experiments, build attribution models, and create executive dashboards. Requires: SQL (expert level), Python (pandas, scikit-learn for basic ML), Tableau or Mode Analytics, experience with statistical testing (t-test, chi-square, Bayesian A/B), and familiarity with dbt. Snowflake experience required. You will present weekly insights to the VP of Growth and work closely with the product team to run experiments. Experience with Amplitude or Mixpanel is a plus.
title: Insights Analyst
company_description: GrowthCo is a product-led growth SaaS platform.
